name: Yeong Hwa Metal Co., Ltd.
summary: Yeong Hwa Metal Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automotive casting products in South Korea. It offers exhaust manifolds, cylinder blocks, and crank shafts; wheel hubs, and diff cases and carriers; brake discs and drums; mission carriers, oil pump housings, and pressure plates; and turbine and bearing housings. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Changwon, South Korea.
